title: Cross-chain sanctions exposure — adversarial payment ecosystem
body: Analysis of sanctions exposure propagating through a nested payment ecosystem involving high-risk operators linked to a sanctioned jurisdiction. Investigation traced multi-hop wallet flows across two chains, identified intermediary addresses used for obfuscation, and mapped indirect SDN exposure through counterparty chains. Intelligence packaged for risk decision-making and regulatory reporting.

title: Iranian oil procurement — VASP wallet rotation analysis
body: Tracing of payment flows associated with Iran-linked oil procurement activity. Investigation identified VASP wallet rotation patterns used to break transaction trails, mapped intermediate stablecoin infrastructure, and assessed exposure across regional payment rails. Findings contributed to a broader ecosystem picture of Iranian sanctions evasion methodology across TRON and ETH.

title: Garantex-adjacent exchanger network — RUB ecosystem exposure
body: Investigation into a nested exchanger network operating in proximity to sanctioned Russian infrastructure. Analysis mapped fund flows through high-risk RUB-denominated payment providers including Heleket and Cryptomus, identified layering patterns used to obscure origin, and assessed indirect exposure risk for institutional counterparties. Typology documented for investigative reuse.

title: DPRK IT worker ecosystem — wallet rotation and laundering pathway
body: Analysis of financial activity associated with DPRK-linked IT worker operations. Investigation traced wallet rotation patterns consolidating earnings from multiple front-company engagements, identified cross-chain layering methodology, and mapped the laundering pathway from initial revenue generation through conversion and off-ramp. Output contributed to internal counter-threat finance typology framework.

title: Huione / Xinbi guarantee system — illicit payment ecosystem briefing
body: Comprehensive investigation and intelligence briefing on Huione and Xinbi guarantee system infrastructure — covering payment rail architecture, actor typology, and the role of these systems in facilitating fraud, cybercrime settlement, and cross-border money laundering. Delivered as a large-scale internal presentation to the CIFC team.

title: Incident-response tracing — post-exploit cross-chain fund flow
body: Time-sensitive investigation following a significant exploit event. Traced post-exploit fund movements across multiple chains, identified obfuscation layers including bridge transactions and mixer-adjacent behaviour, and mapped the probable off-ramp pathway. Findings supported blacklist submissions and security team coordination for live asset tracking.

title: Procurement ecosystem — dual-use technology exposure analysis
body: Strategic analysis of payment flows associated with suspected dual-use technology procurement. Mapped the procurement network structure, assessed sanctions-adjacent risk factors across the payment chain, and produced a strategic risk assessment rather than a single operational investigation output.

title: Regional VASP — enhanced due diligence intelligence
body: Complex exposure review of a regional VASP counterparty with identified links to high-risk jurisdictions and sanctions-adjacent transaction flows. Combined OSINT entity verification, on-chain transaction pattern analysis, and regulatory risk assessment — producing an EDD intelligence package supporting an institutional risk decision.
